data.content: Hardened session-exit notifications to be one-shot: duplicate exit SSE events no longer create duplicate in-app notifications. Added regression test in session-connection-manager tests. Validation in dedicated worktree: bun install --frozen-lockfile, bun run lint (warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit (pass), bun run test (108 files passed), bun run build (fails on existing Next prerender/useContext null issue unrelated to this change). Commit pushed to origin/main: 6bb7c68719982fb5e67e8a9407bdfa0cc06f302c.
